cards.front: What is the primary goal of color models?
cards.back: To describe the relationship between human perception of colors and the physical properties of light

cards.front: What is the main difference between additive and subtractive color models?
cards.back: Additive color models (RGB) combine light to produce colors, while subtractive color models (CMYK) combine light absorption to produce colors

cards.front: What is the term for converting an image into a single color value?
What is the term for converting a color image into a false color representation?
What is the term for converting an RGB image into a CMYK image?
